description: Los Mexicles is a Mexican street gang based in Ciudad Juárez, Chihuahua, allied with the Sinaloa Cartel. Founded in 1987 in Tennessee Colony, Texas, it operates in Texas and northern Mexico. The gang engages in murder, kidnapping, drug trafficking, and other crimes. Its most recent leader, Ernesto Alfredo Piñón de la Cruz, was killed in a shootout with authorities in January 2023.

country_links.evidence_quote: Founding location: Tennessee Colony , Texas , United States (formation)... Territory: Texas and North Mexico
country_links.context: Los Mexicles was founded in Texas and operates there, with territory in Texas.
